title: polystichum decoratum subsp. decoratum
intro: Polystichum decoratum subsp. decoratum, also known as the Decorated Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of Japan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Japanese folk medicine, for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum decoratum subsp. decoratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health problems.
